perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a split-screen format; the top half shows the interior of a red Tesla with a male driver and female passengers, while the bottom half shows a man in a red shirt running ahead of the car on a narrow ramp. (2) As the car enters an underground parking lot, the camera cuts between the driver's nervous expressions and the narrow clearance between the car and the concrete pillars. (3) Different female drivers take turns behind the wheel, showing varying degrees of stress and laughter while navigating the tight turns. (4) Close-up shots of the Tesla's center console screen are shown, highlighting the proximity sensor visualizations. (5) The man in the red shirt continues to guide them from outside, using exaggerated gestures and reacting to the car's close calls.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music begins immediately and remains constant throughout. (2) A male narrator speaks enthusiastically and loudly, providing a running commentary on the driving challenge. (3) Frequent sounds of female laughter and high-pitched screaming are heard as the car maneuvers through the ramp. (4) Cartoon-style 'whoosh' and 'ding' sound effects (SFX) are layered over specific moments of tension or successful turns. (5) The sound of the car's electric motor is occasionally audible as a low hum beneath the vocals and music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '車主很順哦' (The owner is very smooth) - Humorous caption. (2) '阿公撞過三次' (Grandpa hit it three times) - Hook text with a laughing tone. (3) '小心前面的柱子' (Careful of the pillar in front) - Warning text in a variety-show style. (4) '突然的急煞' (Suddenly braking) - Functional text describing the action. (5) '要幹嘛啦' (What are you doing?) - Emotional decorative text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Montage of driving attempts -> Reactions and Commentary -> Final Success.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male guide in red, 1 male passenger/coach, 3 female drivers/passengers switching roles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young man in a bright red t-shirt and black pants acting as a guide; several young women in casual white or patterned blouses taking turns driving.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A narrow, spiraling concrete underground parking ramp with white walls and yellow safety pillars; transition to a nighttime street scene near the end.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed: Artificial fluorescent light in the garage and street lighting at night.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Series of Challenge Attempts -> Reaction Highlights -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience by showing the humorous and stressful experience of driving a modern car through an extremely narrow and difficult parking ramp, highlighting the skill levels of different drivers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The car's features, specifically its proximity sensors and interior design, are central to the video's plot.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Split-screen reaction format with variety-show style text graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the 'challenge' format popular on platforms like YouTube and TikTok, using social pressure and humor to drive engagement.
